detail.zhHant: Set out Mushrooms, Tortillas, Broccoli, Canned tomatoes, Olive oil, cut vegetables into even pieces, and measure the seasoning base before the pan gets hot.

detail.zhHant: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.
detail.yue: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.
detail.en: Warm oil in a wide pan, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until lightly browned and nearly cooked through.
